author: vvo
subject: style: consistent requires
body:
commonjs requires have magic behavior where requiring a folder with
require /index.js and requiring without a filename without extension
will require the same filename with .js.

Since we want to have to full picture without having to open the
filetree, here are two tips for requires:

- when requiring a folder: require('./folder/');
- when requiring a js file: requier('./file.js');

what do you think?
